name: Accio Work
setup: Create a new custom agent manually using setup-guide.md.
Convert each skill section into an Accio reusable skill or workflow card.
Replace codebase automation with upload-based document analysis unless the platform adds shell/file tooling.
notes: This target is best for business workflows, research, and structured output.
Developer workflows that require shell, Git, or patch editing are degraded or unsupported.
